notes: Batch ordering respects all depends_on edges: B-002 before B-007; B-008 before B-009 and before B-014; B-009 before B-014.

PortfolioCard/ProjectFlipPreviewCard/PreparingCard are touched by multiple batches (B-007, B-010, B-013, B-015) but each batch modifies orthogonal concerns (image fallback URL vs. useState->useDisclosure vs. pill classes vs. flip wrapper), so re-touching is acceptable. Implementer should still re-read each file at the start of every batch.
B-006 re-exports PROJECT_CARD_EASE from src/hooks/useProjectGridEntrance.ts so the existing test mock at ProjectsSection.test.tsx:172 continues to resolve via the same import path.

B-008 and B-009 both modify AiDevKitModal/index.tsx in sequence; the dep rule forces them into separate batches. Implementer for batch-003 must read the post-batch-002 state of AiDevKitModal before extracting Escape.

B-014 (ModalShell) intentionally adds Escape + body-scroll-lock to ContactModal.tsx as a positive behavior change — Validator should treat new behavior in ContactModal tests (if any) as expected, not as regression.

batches.title: Dead code purge + typo rename (5 fast wins, no deps)
batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree; for the rename use git mv to preserve blame, so rollback is `git restore --staged --worktree .` then `git clean -fd src/components/AboutMe/ShootingStar.tsx`.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes (all 121+ tests, including DeveloperIntro consumers)
npm run lint passes
ripgrep finds zero remaining references to deleted symbols (InfoIcon, capitalizeFirst, TotalProjectCard, CrazyAboutSection, useIntersectionObserver) anywhere under src/
ripgrep finds zero remaining imports from './ShootingStart' anywhere under src/
git log --follow src/components/AboutMe/ShootingStar.tsx shows pre-rename history (git mv preserved)

batches.title: Token + independent hooks (easings, body-scroll-lock, disclosure, click-outside)
batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree. Each extracted hook lives in a new file, so rollback is purely deletion + restore of consumer call sites.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes (AiDevKitModal scroll-lock test still asserts prior overflow value is restored, NOT '')
npm run lint passes
PROJECT_CARD_EASE remains importable from src/hooks/useProjectGridEntrance for the ProjectsSection test mock
design-tokens.ts exports easings.{projectCard, toast, standard} typed as `readonly [number, number, number, number]`
PostSection and AiDevKitModal no longer contain inline document.body.style.overflow assignments
PageHeader no longer contains inline mousedown listener attachment

batches.title: useEscapeKey + useCopyToClipboardWithToast
batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree. New hook files can be deleted independently. AiDevKitModal Escape behavior must remain functional after rollback (it was inline before batch-002 already split it).
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes (close-on-Escape test still passes for AiDevKitModal)
npm run lint passes
design-tokens.ts exports toastVisibleMs constant (3000) and toast keyframe duration uses the same constant or is documented as kept-in-sync
TotalSummaryComponent no longer contains inline setTimeout for toast clear (race fixed)
useEscapeKey uses the latest-handler ref pattern (verify by reading the implementation)

batches.title: Placeholder constants + image-fallback helper (medium-risk isolated)

extra_grep_checks: rg "via\.placeholder\.com" src/   # must be zero after migration

batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree. New utility files can be deleted; consumer literals must come back exactly as before. NOTE: test files for PortfolioCard/PreparingCard were updated to import the constant — rollback must restore the literal-URL assertions.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes
npm run lint passes
createImageFallbackHandler sets e.currentTarget.onerror = null on first failure (verify in unit test)
ProjectDetailPage's onAfter callback still triggers setIsLoaded(true)
ripgrep finds zero remaining via.placeholder.com references in src/
All 5 placeholder URLs collapse to the same PLACEHOLDER_THUMB / PLACEHOLDER_PROJECT constant (or named subset)

batches.title: Chip primitive (largest single extraction, 9 sites)

validation_strategy.validation_strategy_note: extra-careful — 4 of 9 consumer files are untested (WorkExperienceCard, CertificationCard, WorkSection, ProjectFlipPreviewCard). Implementer must visually verify these in dev mode OR add minimal characterization snapshots before marking done.

batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree. New primitive file can be deleted independently. Watch out for class-string drift in untested consumers — diff the rendered className strings before/after if possible.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes (all tested consumers still render expected pill content)
npm run lint passes
Chip exports tones: accentSoft | accentSolid | neutralSoft | outlined and sizes: sm | md
neutralSoft tone retains bg-slate-200 (deferred D-009 will migrate)
outlined tone uses border-line bg-surface text-content-secondary font-semibold
All 9 occurrence sites import Chip; ripgrep finds zero remaining inline rounded-full pill class combos in the affected files

batches.title: ModalShell primitive (consumes batch-002/003 hooks)

validation_strategy.validation_strategy_note: extra-careful — ContactModal gains Escape + body-scroll-lock as a deliberate positive behavior change. If ContactModal has tests asserting absence of these behaviors, those assertions must be updated, not interpreted as regressions.

batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree. ContactModal must be restored to its pre-batch state (no Escape, no body-scroll) — call this out in the PR description as the intentional behavior addition.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes
npm run lint passes
ModalShell uses useBodyScrollLock and useEscapeKey internally
click on backdrop calls onClose; click on panel does NOT (event.stopPropagation present)
panel uses rounded-modal + bg-surface + shadow-2xl + animate-fade-in-up
ContactModal now closes on Escape and locks body scroll while open (verified by manual smoke or new test)

batches.title: FlippableCard primitive (3D flip wrapper)

validation_strategy.validation_strategy_note: ProjectFlipPreviewCard is untested — implementer should add a minimal snapshot test for the auto-rotate driver before marking done.

batches.rollback_strategy: git restore . in worktree. New primitive can be deleted; both consumers' inline 3D-transform JSX must come back as before.
success_criteria: npx tsc --noEmit passes
npm test -- --run passes (PortfolioCard hover-flip behavior still asserts isFlipped toggle)
npm run lint passes
FlippableCard does NOT hard-code aspect/sizing — caller passes className
outer perspective:1000px wrapper present; inner preserve-3d transform-style + transition-transform duration-700 present
back face rotateY(180deg) baseline verified
PortfolioCard uses hover driver; ProjectFlipPreviewCard uses auto-rotate driver — both work via the same isFlipped prop
